| 12.3.3 | Internal Service TLS Communication | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | SVN operations disable TLS certificate verification (FINDING-013), OAuth token exchange bypasses hardened TLS (FINDING-063), Apache reverse proxy disables all TLS certificate validation (FINDING-064) |
| 12.3.4 | Trusted Certificate Configuration | L2 | ❌ Fail | Apache reverse proxy disables all TLS certificate validation (FINDING-064) |
| 13.1.1 | Communication Needs Documentation | L2 | ❌ Fail | No communication needs documentation (FINDING-241) |
| 13.2.1 | Backend Service Authentication | L2 | ❌ Fail | No backend service authentication documented (FINDING-241) |
| 13.2.2 | Backend Least Privilege | L2 | ❌ Fail | No backend least privilege documentation (FINDING-241) |
| 13.2.3 | Service Authentication Credentials | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | OAuth token exchange bypasses hardened TLS (FINDING-063) |
| 13.2.4 | Outbound Communication Allowlist | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Hardcoded domain allowlisting excellent but no formal allowlist documentation |
| 13.2.5 | Outbound Request Allowlist | L2 | ❌ Fail | No outbound request allowlist documented (FINDING-241) |
| 13.3.1 | Secrets Management Solution | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | JWT signing key file permissions 0o400 but admin environment variable endpoint exposes all secrets (FINDING-014), admin /admin/env exposes environment variables (FINDING-175) |
| 13.3.2 | Secret Access Least Privilege | L2 | ❌ Fail | Admin environment variable endpoint exposes all secrets (FINDING-014), pagination offset validation bypassed (FINDING-015) |
| 13.4.1 | Source Control Metadata Exposure Prevention | L1 | ✅ Pass | .git directory blocked by safe.RelPath validation. Missing .dockerignore (FINDING-284) is build optimization, not security |
| 13.4.2 | Debug Modes Disabled in Production Environments | L2 | ❌ Fail | ALLOW_TESTS enables authentication bypass in production worker (FINDING-044), runtime environment detection bypasses LDAP (FINDING-045), test endpoints accessible in production (FINDING-176), unauthenticated endpoint exposes error details (FINDING-177), JWT error response leaks claims (FINDING-178), admin /admin/env exposes environment variables (FINDING-175), admin debug test route available (FINDING-288), API error responses leak internal details (FINDING-289), admin database browser available (FINDING-290), task arguments logged at INFO level (FINDING-291), database connection URL logged (FINDING-292), pagination offset validation bypassed (FINDING-293) |
| 13.4.3 | Unintended Information Leakage - Web Server Directory Listings | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | User directory listing enabled without hardening (FINDING-179), dev vhost missing vhost-level headers (FINDING-180), no explicit directory listing prevention on docroot (FINDING-294) |
| 13.4.4 | Unintended Information Leakage - HTTP TRACE Method | L2 | ❌ Fail | HTTP TRACE not disabled at Apache reverse proxy (FINDING-181), no application-level TRACE rejection (FINDING-295) |
| 13.4.5 | Unintended Information Leakage - Documentation and Monitoring Endpoints | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Internal documentation publicly exposed (FINDING-182), Swagger UI and OpenAPI publicly accessible (FINDING-183), admin /admin/env exposes environment variables (FINDING-175), admin debug test route available (FINDING-288) |

| 14.2.1 | Sensitive Data in URLs | L1 | ✅ Pass | No sensitive data in URLs. OAuth authorization code in query string (FINDING-285) is OAuth protocol standard |
| 14.2.2 | Preventing Sensitive Data Caching in Server Components | L2 | ❌ Fail | Admin endpoints exposing secrets lack Cache-Control headers (FINDING-046), API JWT creation endpoint missing Cache-Control (FINDING-047), key management endpoints lack Cache-Control (FINDING-184), session cache persists data indefinitely (FINDING-185), WorkflowSSHKey entries not purged (FINDING-186), principal authorization cache lacks purge (FINDING-296), in-memory log buffer retains sensitive data (FINDING-297), session cache file written without restrictive permissions (FINDING-298) |
| 14.2.3 | Sensitive Data Sent to Untrusted Parties | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Full email content logged at INFO level (FINDING-187), JWT claims logged at DEBUG level (FINDING-299), user identity data sent to GitHub API (FINDING-300) |
| 14.2.4 | General Data Protection - Sensitive Data Controls | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Admin environment variable endpoint exposes secrets (FINDING-014), audit log integrity bug (FINDING-188), HMAC integrity verification broken (FINDING-189), GPG debug output stored publicly (FINDING-190), session cache persists data indefinitely (FINDING-185), full email content logged (FINDING-187), JWT claims logged (FINDING-299), JWT TTL documentation mismatch (FINDING-301), expired PATs not purged (FINDING-302), debug print bypasses logging (FINDING-303), environment variables logged in exception handler (FINDING-304), pagination offset validation bypassed (FINDING-293) |
| 14.3.1 | Client-side Data Protection - Authenticated Data Cleared | L1 | ⚠️ Partial | Clear-Site-Data on logout but missing on implicit termination (FINDING-173), no client-side fallback for offline cleanup (FINDING-174), JWT DOM auto-clear lacks page lifecycle handlers (FINDING-286), no Cache-Control: no-store on authenticated responses (FINDING-287) |
| 14.3.2 | Client-side Data Protection | L2 | ❌ Fail | OAuth session display returns full session without anti-caching headers (FINDING-010), no global anti-caching middleware (FINDING-011), API JWT creation endpoint missing Cache-Control (FINDING-047), OAuth login success lacks anti-caching (FINDING-048), admin endpoints expose sensitive data without anti-caching (FINDING-049), API /user/info returns authorization data without anti-caching (FINDING-191) |
| 14.3.3 | Client-side Data Protection: Browser Storage Sensitive Data | L2 | ❌ Fail | Session cookie contains PII and authorization data in readable format (FINDING-192), client-side JWT display TypeScript not available for audit (FINDING-305) |
| 15.1.1 | Risk-Based Remediation Timeframes for Third-Party Components | L1 | ❌ Fail | No documented risk-based remediation timeframes (FINDING-198), general library update timeframe enforced but undocumented (FINDING-306), Dependabot cooldown may delay critical patches (FINDING-307) |
| 15.1.2 | Third-Party Library Inventory and Trusted Repository Verification | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Pre-commit ecosystem Dependabot monitoring disabled (FINDING-051), binary tool downloaded without integrity verification (FINDING-201), Syft installed via unverified script (FINDING-202), no formal SBOM for ATR's dependencies (FINDING-203) |
| 15.1.3 | Resource-Intensive Operations Documentation | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | Pagination offset validation bypassed (FINDING-012), rsync without timeout (FINDING-050), missing centralized documentation (FINDING-052), unbounded directory traversal and file hashing (FINDING-053), OSV scanning without timeout (FINDING-193), unbounded response sizes (FINDING-194), thread message fetching without timeout (FINDING-195), ZIP download streaming without guards (FINDING-196), unbounded distribution status check loop (FINDING-197) |
| 15.2.1 | Components Within Update and Remediation Timeframes | L1 | ⚠️ Partial | Pre-commit ecosystem Dependabot disabled (FINDING-051), GitHub Actions use mutable references (FINDING-054), no documented timeframe for npm/frontend dependencies (FINDING-199), no timeframe for Dockerfile-installed tools (FINDING-200), pre-release dependency used in production (FINDING-308) |
| 15.2.2 | Defenses Against Resource-Demanding Functionality | L2 | ❌ Fail | Pagination offset validation bypassed (FINDING-012), rsync without timeout (FINDING-050), archive extraction size tracking reset (FINDING-055), Git clone without timeout (FINDING-056), OSV API unbounded pagination (FINDING-204), SSH server lacks timeouts (FINDING-205), SBOM conformance requests without timeout (FINDING-206), admin data browser loads all records (FINDING-207), unbounded PGP key block processing (FINDING-208) |

| 15.3.2 | Redirect Following Configuration | L2 | ❌ Fail | HTTP redirects followed without target domain validation (FINDING-081) |
| 15.3.3 | Mass Assignment Protection | L2 | ✅ Pass | Pydantic extra='forbid' prevents mass assignment |
| 15.3.4 | IP Address Handling via Proxies | L2 | ⚠️ Partial | ProxyFixMiddleware properly configured but dev vhost does not sanitize X-Forwarded-For (FINDING-117) |
